---
title-block-banner: false
---

<style>
#head {
  padding-top: 50px;
}
</style>


<!-- ![](img/john-myers-5.svg){fig-align='center' width=100% id=head} -->

<span style="font-family: var(--bs-font-monospace); font-weight: 300; display: block; text-align: center; font-size: 3rem; color: #FFC300;">john myers, ph.d.</span>
